creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text:
Responsible Changed
From-To: freebsd-usb->hselasky

It appears the quirk in the PR is not in HEAD or stable/9.  I tested this 
keyboard (MS Natural 4000) on stable/9 and can confirm that the function 
keys do not work, and that adding the UQ_KBD_BOOTPROTO quirk manually via 
usbconfig makes them work. 

HPS, any reason this quirk shouldn't be committed?
